title: selaginella corallina
intro: Selaginella corallina, also known as the Coral Fern or Coral Varnish Fern, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to the tropical regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella corallina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Selaginella corallina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
